name: swerpicommerce-pp-mcp
description: Swerpicommerce API surface as MCP tools.

swerpicommerce_bearer_auth.title: SWERPICOMMERCE_BEARER_AUTH
swerpicommerce_bearer_auth.description: Sets SWERPICOMMERCE_BEARER_AUTH for the Swerpicommerce MCP server.

swerpicommerce_base_url.title: SWERPICOMMERCE_BASE_URL
swerpicommerce_base_url.description: Base URL del tenant SwerpiCommerce (es. https://<tenant>.swebbysites.com/api/v2).
